programs.title: Forbidden History 3
programs.desc: Jamie Theakston seeks out the facts behind famous legends, myths and popular conspiracy theories.Together with the program's team, he tries to solve the biggest historical mysteries by comparing facts, looking for new evidence and talking to experts.In the third season, the creators of the series delve into the mystery of the biblical Ark of the Covenant and reveal the true identity of the Man in the Iron Mask.They also explore stories about famous vampires, looking for their prototypes among historical figures.They also deal with conspiracy theories questioning Hitler's death in the Berlin bunker and analyze the history of Satanism.

programs.title: Forbidden History 3
programs.desc: Jamie Theakston seeks out the facts behind famous legends, myths and popular conspiracy theories.Together with the program's team, he tries to solve the biggest historical mysteries by comparing facts, looking for new evidence and talking to experts.In the third season, the creators of the series delve into the mystery of the biblical Ark of the Covenant and reveal the true identity of the Man in the Iron Mask.They also explore stories about famous vampires, looking for their prototypes among historical figures.They also deal with conspiracy theories questioning Hitler's death in the Berlin bunker and analyze the history of Satanism.

programs.title: The Sum of All Cities
programs.desc: Due to the fact that Stockholm is located on 14 islands connected by 57 bridges, it is called the Venice of the North.Residents feel the proximity to the water, kayaks and ferries carrying half a million passengers a day are popular.Climate change is taking its toll on the city.To combat their effects, energy for 400,000 homes is obtained from waste.The basis here is trust - children go to schools on their own, and there are no ticket checks on buses.It was in the capital of Sweden that Spotify and Minecraft were created.

programs.title: Mega Building Collection
programs.desc: More impressive buildings will be presented, which attract attention with their scale and represent engineering achievements.

programs.title: Nazi Megastructures: Battle Ready
programs.desc: Profiles of engineers responsible for the construction of the most dangerous military facilities.Their works contributed to the technological revolution.The figures of Heinrich Himmler and Joseph Goebbels, who were completely devoted to Hitler, will also be introduced.The Führer assigned them the task of building the Nazi social machine.The program will also discuss the attack on the Soviet Union and the failure of total war tactics.You will be able to learn about the creation of the battleships Bismarck and Tirpitz, as well as the bunkers intended to protect submarines.In addition, the creators will talk about the conflict in the Pacific and the largest floating fortress armed with powerful guns.
